title: ilex summa
intro: Ilex summa, also known as the American holly, is a type of evergreen plant native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ilex summa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Ilex summa is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicines, salves, and ointments to treat various health conditions.
